subject: Webhook signature spec — quick clarification
body:
Hello,

We're integrating your webhook events. The docs say the signature is HMAC-SHA256 of the raw body, but should the timestamp header be included in the signed payload (Stripe-style) or not? The docs aren't explicit.

If you can confirm in the next day or two we can ship Friday.

Thanks,
Liang

subject: [BETA] crash on iOS 17 when uploading > 50MB

Hi,

Reporting from the beta program. The mobile app crashes consistently when I upload any file larger than ~50MB on iOS 17 (iPhone 14 Pro). I can reproduce it 100% — happy to send a video. Crash log attached.

Let me know if there's a workaround. Otherwise I'm blocked on testing the new flow.

Thanks,
Daniela

subject: Feature request — bulk webhook retry from dashboard
body:
Hi,

We've been a paying customer for ~14 months. Our biggest pain point right now: when a batch of webhooks fail (e.g. our consumer was down for an hour), we have no way to retry them in bulk from the dashboard. We end up writing one-off scripts against your API every time.

Specifically I'd want:
1. A 'retry failed' button on the webhook events page, scoped to a time range
2. A way to filter to only the events that haven't been ack'd yet
3. Some confirmation dialog so we don't accidentally retry millions

Our whole infra team has hit this. Is this on the roadmap? If yes, what's the timeline? If no, what would it take to get it on?

Happy to jump on a call to walk through the use case.

Thanks,
Helena (CTO, OrbitLogic)
